description: Status of literature search:  yes = usable data found;  water_proxy = data in dry weight, conversion to wet weight used species-specific water content proxy from the literature (see notes);  not_whole = data for a part of the body, not entire organism (not usable; see notes);  no_water = data in dry weight, water content not provided and proxy cannot be used;  no = no data found
Lipid content; % of wet weight (ww), converted from dry weight (dw) or ash-free dry weight (afdw) if ww unavailable
Protein content; % of ww, converted from dw or afdw if ww unavailable
Energy density; per gram ww, converted from dw or afdw if ww unavailable
Indicates analysis method for energy density

Energy density, reported per g of dry weight
Energy density, reported per g of ash-free dry weight
Mean wet weight of organism analyzed; if not provided, calculated as average of min and max weight
Minimum wet weight of organism analyzed
Maximum wet weight of organism analyzed
Mean length of organism analyzed; if not provided, calculated as average of min and max length
Length measurement type; TL = total length, SL = standard length (fish), FL = fork length (fish), ML = mantle length (cephalopods), CL = carapace length (crustaceans), PL = pen length (cephalopods)
values: TL, SL, FL, ML, CL, PL
